sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85341" key="poluspermi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-σπερμία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85341.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abundance of semen,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:2:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
